description: The ``Value Repeat`` node takes in the number value and the expected length range, then returns a value of the expected placement of that number. This is similar to the Value Mod node.

fields.N: The number value we are checking.
fields.Length: The expected range for our number to be in. If the number we gave rolls over, it will wrap around this length.
fields.* (Pseudo-Generic): The result of the repeated value.
